comment.text: This is a label for a size limit setting. It indicates the maximum allowed size for a single folder when uploading multiple folders.

usage.context:
<CategorySubHeader>{t("UploadLimits")}</CategorySubHeader>
 <SizeLimitSetter
 labelText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizePerFolder")
 : t("MaximumFileSizePerFile")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSize")
 : t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
